# zui widget reference (generated)

<!-- GENERATED by tools/skills/build-widgets.mjs (#341) - do NOT edit.
     Sources: references/widgets/<kind>/{meta.json,example.json}.
     Regenerate: bun tools/skills/build-widgets.mjs (or just skills-build). -->

Every node is a JSON object whose FIRST key is `k` (the kind name); `id` is
valid on every kind (live-update target / event key / values{} key). Only the
fields listed per kind decode on the device (zui_cbor.c) - anything else is
silently skipped. JSON conveniences (the SDK encoder): `live`/`advance` take
booleans (wire keys `lv`/`adv`), `role` takes a name (`none`/`submit`/
`dismiss`/`event`/`next`/`prev`), `k` takes the kind name or the wire index.

**Streamable: no** means a pushed node of the kind cannot render meaningful
content by design (see its reason) - never push it standalone (#328). Its
example is a stub that demonstrates the placeholder render only.

| kind | wire `k` | streamable | decodable fields |
|---|---|---|---|
| [`screen`](#screen) | 0 | yes | `t` `lyt` `c` |
| [`gap`](#gap) | 1 | yes | `h` |
| [`text`](#text) | 2 | yes | `t` |
| [`title`](#title) | 3 | yes | `t` |
| [`eyebrow`](#eyebrow) | 4 | yes | `t` |
| [`big`](#big) | 5 | yes | `t` |
| [`list`](#list) | 6 | yes | `c` |
| [`row`](#row) | 7 | yes | `t` `ic` `sub` `tg` `on` `cv` `pg` `sp` |
| [`btn`](#btn) | 8 | yes | `t` `ic` `var` `sz` `col` `role` `key` |
| [`btnrow`](#btnrow) | 9 | yes | `c` |
| [`chips`](#chips) | 10 | yes | `opts` `on` |
| [`slider`](#slider) | 11 | yes | `v` `live` |
| [`segslider`](#segslider) | 12 | yes | `v` `live` |
| [`ring`](#ring) | 13 | yes | `v` `t` `sub` |
| [`act`](#act) | 14 | yes | - |
| [`widget`](#widget) | 15 | yes | `var` `t` `v` `val` `bars` `sub` `ic` |
| [`vu`](#vu) | 16 | yes | - |
| [`listen`](#listen) | 17 | yes | - |
| [`spinner`](#spinner) | 18 | yes | - |
| [`picker`](#picker) | 19 | yes | `t` `opts` `sel` |
| [`clock`](#clock) | 20 | yes | `t` `date` |
| [`applist`](#applist) | 21 | yes | `c` |
| [`box`](#box) | 22 | yes | `c` |
| [`grid`](#grid) | 23 | yes | `c` `cols` |
| [`stepper`](#stepper) | 24 | yes | `total` `done` |
| [`tabs`](#tabs) | 25 | yes | `opts` `sel` |
| [`toggle`](#toggle) | 26 | yes | `t` `sub` `on` `live` |
| [`select`](#select) | 27 | yes | `t` `opts` `multi` `sel` `on` `live` |
| [`section`](#section) | 28 | yes | `t` `c` |
| [`dial`](#dial) | 29 | yes | `t` `opts` |
| [`banner`](#banner) | 30 | yes | `t` `ic` `var` |
| [`progress`](#progress) | 31 | yes | `v` `col` |
| [`slot`](#slot) | 32 | **no** | - |
| [`pageview`](#pageview) | 33 | yes | `c` |
| [`choice`](#choice) | 34 | yes | `c` `advance` |
| [`image`](#image) | 35 | yes | - |

## screen

Screen - Full-screen root: a layout template + a column of children. The usual root of a push_screen tree.

Wire kind: 0. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| title | `t` | string | Screen title; rendered by the foundation/list/pinned layouts (suppressed when room chrome owns the title). |
| layout | `lyt` | uint | 0 = foundation (safe-area scrolling column, default), 1 = centered, 2 = list (sticky title + rows), 3 = pinned (scrolling content + fixed bottom CTA). |
| children | `c` | array | Child nodes, rendered top to bottom into the layout slot. |

- The pinned layout's fixed bottom CTA (zui.h screen.cta) has no CBOR key - lyt 3 over the wire renders without a bottom CTA.

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "t": "Deploy",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "text",
      "t": "Pick an environment on the next page"
    }
  ]
}
```

## gap

Gap - Fixed vertical spacer between siblings.

Wire kind: 1. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| height | `h` | uint | Height in px; 0/omitted = theme default spacing. |

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "text",
      "t": "Above the gap"
    },
    {
      "k": "gap",
      "h": 32
    },
    {
      "k": "text",
      "t": "Below the gap"
    }
  ]
}
```

## text

Text - Body text line; wraps at the display edge.

Wire kind: 2. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| text | `t` | string | The text. Wraps full-width; alignment follows the layout (centered template centers it). |

- The zui.h color/center fields have no CBOR keys.

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "text",
      "t": "Plain body text wraps at the display edge of the 1.8 inch screen."
    }
  ]
}
```

## title

Title - Large heading text.

Wire kind: 3. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| text | `t` | string | The heading text (large UI font). |

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "title",
      "t": "Build finished"
    }
  ]
}
```

## eyebrow

Eyebrow - Small uppercase context line (pixel-blue mono accent) above the payload.

Wire kind: 4. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| text | `t` | string | The context line. Keep it UPPERCASE and short. |

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "lyt": 1,
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "eyebrow",
      "t": "BUILD"
    },
    {
      "k": "big",
      "t": "Green"
    }
  ]
}
```

## big

Big - Large display text - the one-glance payload (1-3 words).

Wire kind: 5. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| text | `t` | string | The display text (large font). |

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "lyt": 1,
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "big",
      "t": "64%"
    }
  ]
}
```

## list

List - Vertical column of children - typically row nodes (a swipe-up page).

Wire kind: 6. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| children | `c` | array | Child nodes (usually rows). |

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "list",
      "c": [
        {
          "k": "row",
          "t": "zeph",
          "ic": "folder",
          "cv": 1
        },
        {
          "k": "row",
          "t": "companion",
          "ic": "folder",
          "cv": 1
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## row

Row - The standard list cell: leading icon, title (+ subtitle), trailing switch or chevron.

Wire kind: 7. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| title | `t` | string | Cell title. |
| icon | `ic` | string | Leading Lucide icon name (device icon subset). |
| subtitle | `sub` | string | Secondary line under the title. |
| toggle | `tg` | uint | 1 = trailing switch (whole-row tap flips it). |
| on | `on` | uint | Initial switch state when tg = 1. |
| chevron | `cv` | uint | 1 = trailing chevron. |
| page ref | `pg` | string | Swipe-up page ref ("app.export"): tap opens that page (v13 #358). |
| spinner | `sp` | uint | 1 = leading live arc spinner replaces the icon (working glyph, v13 #358). |

- The zui.h trailing value (val), icon color and custom icon image fields have no CBOR keys.

- v13 #358: pg rows also render a trailing chevron; pre-v13 decoders skip pg/sp (inert row).

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "row",
      "t": "Wi-Fi",
      "ic": "wifi",
      "sub": "Connected",
      "tg": 1,
      "on": 1
    },
    {
      "k": "row",
      "t": "auth refactor",
      "sub": "working",
      "sp": 1,
      "pg": "claude_code.sessions"
    }
  ]
}
```

## btn

Button - Pill button: label + optional icon, variant/size/color styling, v12 role + physical-key binding.

Wire kind: 8. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| label | `t` | string | One line. Max 24 ASCII chars in modal bodies (18 when key-bound). |
| icon | `ic` | string | Leading Lucide icon name. |
| variant | `var` | uint | 0 = filled (default), 1 = tinted, 2 = gray, 3 = plain, 4 = success, 5 = destructive. |
| size | `sz` | uint | 0 = md (default), 1 = sm, 2 = icon (circle), 3 = icon-sm. |
| color | `col` | uint | Palette override (zui_color_ref): 0 = variant default, 1 = accent, 2 = ok, 3 = warn, 4 = danger, 5 = pixel, 6-8 = ink1-3, 9-10 = surface/surface2, 11-18 = vibrant blue/teal/green/amber/orange/crimson/iris/violet. |
| role | `role` | string | v12 dispatch: "submit" \| "dismiss" (terminal), "event" (pings, stays), "next" \| "prev" (local paging). JSON takes the name; the wire carries the uint. |
| key | `key` | string | v12 physical-button binding: "up", "down", "up.double", "down.double". The button renders the key glyph; hold is never bindable. |

- An `id` makes taps report through the btn hook (modal action / widget event).

- The zui.h hold (long-press fill) field has no CBOR key.

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "text",
      "t": "Ready to deploy"
    },
    {
      "k": "btn",
      "id": "go",
      "t": "Deploy",
      "ic": "play",
      "role": "submit",
      "key": "up"
    }
  ]
}
```

## btnrow

Button row - Horizontal row of buttons, evenly stretched.

Wire kind: 9. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| children | `c` | array | Child nodes (btn nodes); each grows to an equal share. |

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "btnrow",
      "c": [
        {
          "k": "btn",
          "t": "Retry",
          "var": 1
        },
        {
          "k": "btn",
          "t": "Skip",
          "var": 2
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## chips

Chips - Wrapping row of label pills (on/off tinted).

Wire kind: 10. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| labels | `opts` | array of strings | Chip labels (max 16); the count sets the chip count. |
| on flags | `on` | array of uints | Per-chip 0/1 accent tint; a shorter list reads 0 for the tail. |

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "text",
      "t": "Transports"
    },
    {
      "k": "chips",
      "opts": [
        "Wifi",
        "BLE",
        "USB"
      ],
      "on": [
        1,
        0,
        1
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## slider

Slider - Continuous 0-100 slider.

Wire kind: 11. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| value | `v` | uint | Initial value, 0-100. |
| live | `live` | bool | v12: with an `id`, stream value changes as widget events (debounced) while the modal stays up. JSON `live: true`; wire key `lv`. |

- The zui.h leading icon field has no CBOR key.

- With an `id` the final value collects into the terminal values{} map.

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "text",
      "t": "Volume"
    },
    {
      "k": "slider",
      "id": "level",
      "v": 40,
      "live": true
    }
  ]
}
```

## segslider

Segmented slider - watchOS-style stepped slider: minus/plus buttons flanking a segmented track.

Wire kind: 12. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| value | `v` | uint | Initial filled stops. |
| live | `live` | bool | v12: with an `id`, stream step changes as widget events. JSON `live: true`; wire key `lv`. |

- The zui.h stops/icon_lo/icon_hi/big fields have no CBOR keys - wire segsliders render 5 stops with minus/plus buttons.

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "segslider",
      "v": 3
    }
  ]
}
```

## ring

Ring - Single progress ring (full-circle arc).

Wire kind: 13. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| value | `v` | uint | 0-100 arc fill. |
| label | `t` | string | Center label (v13 #358). |
| caption | `sub` | string | Caption under the ring (v13 #358). |

- The zui.h size field has no CBOR key - wire rings render 92px.

- v13 #358: t/sub are on the wire now; pre-v13 decoders skip them (unlabeled ring).

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "lyt": 1,
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "ring",
      "v": 72,
      "t": "72%",
      "sub": "5h window"
    }
  ]
}
```

## act

Activity rings - Decorative triple activity rings (fixed demo values).

Wire kind: 14. Streamable: yes.

- No data fields decode (zui.h size has no CBOR key) - the rings render fixed demo fills at 92px. Decorative only.

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "lyt": 1,
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "act"
    }
  ]
}
```

## widget

Widget card - Generic data card (gauge/chart/progress/label variants).

Wire kind: 15. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| variant | `var` | uint | 0 gauge, 1 chart, 2 progress, 3 label, 4 combo; out-of-range is ignored (gauge). |
| title | `t` | string | Mono caption above the body. |
| value | `v` | uint | 0-100; drives the gauge arc / progress bar. |
| value string | `val` | string | Big value line under the body (any unit text). |
| bars | `bars` | array of uints | Chart variant: bar values 0-100 (max 16). |
| subtitle | `sub` | string | Mono footer line. |
| icon | `ic` | string | Lucide icon (label/combo variants only). |

- The C-side `color` field has no renderer arm and stays unwired.

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "widget",
      "var": 0,
      "t": "BATTERY",
      "v": 62,
      "val": "62%"
    },
    {
      "k": "widget",
      "var": 1,
      "t": "CPU",
      "bars": [
        20,
        45,
        80,
        60,
        100,
        35
      ],
      "sub": "last 6 h"
    }
  ]
}
```

## vu

VU meter - Static VU bar cluster (audio-level visual).

Wire kind: 16. Streamable: yes.

- No fields - renders a fixed bar pattern.

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "lyt": 1,
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "vu"
    }
  ]
}
```

## listen

Listening halo - Concentric accent circles - the listening indicator.

Wire kind: 17. Streamable: yes.

- No fields.

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "lyt": 1,
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "listen"
    }
  ]
}
```

## spinner

Spinner - Indeterminate progress arc.

Wire kind: 18. Streamable: yes.

- The zui.h label field has no CBOR key - wire spinners render the arc alone.

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "lyt": 1,
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "spinner"
    }
  ]
}
```

## picker

Picker - Value-row that opens a full-screen select.

Wire kind: 19. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| title | `t` | string | Row label. |
| options | `opts` | array of strings | The full-screen select options (max 16). |
| selected | `sel` | uint | Current option index, shown as the trailing value; out-of-range shows empty. |

- In pushed docs prefer `choice` when the pick itself is the interaction - picker needs the device picker overlay hook for the full-screen select.

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "picker",
      "t": "Region",
      "opts": [
        "Europe",
        "US"
      ],
      "sel": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

## clock

Clock - Big mono time + date stack.

Wire kind: 20. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| time | `t` | string | Time string (the device does NOT tick it - push updates or use glance faces). |
| date | `date` | string | Secondary date line under the time. |

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "lyt": 1,
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "clock",
      "t": "12:34",
      "date": "Thu Jun 12"
    }
  ]
}
```

## applist

App list - Launcher-style column of app rows.

Wire kind: 21. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| children | `c` | array | Rendered as a plain column (#328 added it to the container set); functionally `list` - prefer `list` unless you mean launcher semantics. |

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "applist",
      "c": [
        {
          "k": "row",
          "t": "Timer",
          "ic": "timer",
          "cv": 1
        },
        {
          "k": "row",
          "t": "Player",
          "ic": "play",
          "cv": 1
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## box

Box - Plain container column - the widget-slot content pattern and the modal page wrapper.

Wire kind: 22. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| children | `c` | array | Child nodes, stacked vertically. |

- The zui.h row (horizontal flow) and gap fields have no CBOR keys - wire boxes are vertical columns with default spacing.

- A box is a valid doc ROOT (the widget-slot push and modal page shape).

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "box",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "eyebrow",
      "t": "5H LIMIT"
    },
    {
      "k": "big",
      "t": "64%"
    }
  ]
}
```

## grid

Grid - Wrapping N-column grid of children.

Wire kind: 23. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| children | `c` | array | Child nodes; each sized to an equal column share. |
| columns | `cols` | uint | Column count 1-4 (clamped); absent = 2. |

- v13 #358: cols is on the wire now; pre-v13 decoders skip it and render 2 columns.

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "grid",
      "c": [
        {
          "k": "btn",
          "t": "A"
        },
        {
          "k": "btn",
          "t": "B"
        },
        {
          "k": "btn",
          "t": "C"
        }
      ],
      "cols": 3
    }
  ]
}
```

## stepper

Stepper dots - Progress pills (done/total).

Wire kind: 24. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| total | `total` | uint | Pill count (0 renders one dim pill). |
| done | `done` | uint | Pills 0..done-1 render wide + accent. |

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "text",
      "t": "Step 2 of 5"
    },
    {
      "k": "stepper",
      "total": 5,
      "done": 2
    }
  ]
}
```

## tabs

Tabs - Pill segmented page nav.

Wire kind: 25. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| labels | `opts` | array of strings | Segment labels (max 16). |
| selected | `sel` | uint | Accented segment index; out-of-range matches nothing. |

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "tabs",
      "opts": [
        "All",
        "New",
        "Done"
      ],
      "sel": 1
    },
    {
      "k": "text",
      "t": "2 new notifications"
    }
  ]
}
```

## toggle

Toggle - Standalone labeled switch card (title + subtitle left, switch right; whole-row tap flips).

Wire kind: 26. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| title | `t` | string | Switch label. |
| subtitle | `sub` | string | Secondary line under the label. |
| on | `on` | uint | Initial state: 1 = on. |
| live | `live` | bool | v12: with an `id`, stream flips as widget events. JSON `live: true`; wire key `lv`. |

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "toggle",
      "id": "alerts",
      "t": "Alerts",
      "sub": "Badge only",
      "on": 1,
      "live": true
    }
  ]
}
```

## select

Select - Checkbox (multi) / radio option group with trailing checks.

Wire kind: 27. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| title | `t` | string | Group header above the inset card. |
| options | `opts` | array of strings | Option labels, one cell each (max 16). |
| multi | `multi` | bool | true = checkbox group (uses `on`), false/absent = radio (uses `sel`). |
| selected | `sel` | uint | Radio: the checked option index. |
| on flags | `on` | array of uints | Checkbox: per-option 0/1 checked; a shorter list reads 0 for the tail. |
| live | `live` | bool | v12: with an `id`, taps stream the option index as widget events. JSON `live: true`; wire key `lv`. |

- With a node `id` the tapped option index collects into the terminal values{} map.

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "select",
      "id": "chan",
      "t": "Channel",
      "opts": [
        "Stable",
        "Beta"
      ],
      "sel": 0,
      "live": true
    }
  ]
}
```

## section

Section - Inset-joined grouped list: uppercase header + one card, children joined with hairline dividers.

Wire kind: 28. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| title | `t` | string | Group header (rendered uppercase mono above the card). |
| children | `c` | array | Child nodes (usually rows), joined into one card. |

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "section",
      "t": "AUDIO",
      "c": [
        {
          "k": "row",
          "t": "Volume",
          "ic": "volume-2",
          "cv": 1
        },
        {
          "k": "row",
          "t": "Mic gain",
          "ic": "mic",
          "cv": 1
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## dial

Dial - Radial hub + spokes (thumb-reach action wheel).

Wire kind: 29. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| hub label | `t` | string | Center hub text. |
| spokes | `opts` | array of strings | Spoke labels, placed clockwise from the top (max 16; 4-6 fit). |

- Full-screen radial layout - give it the screen (do not stack it in a column).

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "dial",
      "t": "Scenes",
      "opts": [
        "Work",
        "Home",
        "Sleep",
        "Away"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## banner

Banner - Inline info/warn/error strip: icon + wrapping text on a tinted surface.

Wire kind: 30. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| text | `t` | string | Banner text (wraps). |
| icon | `ic` | string | Leading Lucide icon name. |
| variant | `var` | uint | 0 = info (accent, default), 1 = warn, 2 = error. |

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "banner",
      "ic": "battery-warning",
      "t": "Battery low - 12% left",
      "var": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

## progress

Progress bar - Determinate horizontal bar, 0-100.

Wire kind: 31. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| value | `v` | uint | 0-100 fill. |
| color | `col` | uint | Indicator palette ref (same table as btn col); 0 = accent. |

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "text",
      "t": "Step 2 of 5 - migrations"
    },
    {
      "k": "progress",
      "v": 40
    }
  ]
}
```

## slot

Widget slot - Glance-face placeholder substituted by the slot resolver at render.

Wire kind: 32. Streamable: **NO**.

Not streamable: Firmware-only BY DESIGN (#328 decision): `idx`/`family` have no CBOR keys because substitution requires the device-side glance-face slot resolver (zui_render_set_slot_resolver) - outside glance composition a pushed slot can only render the dashed unassigned placeholder, so streaming one is never meaningful. Glance-composition IR only.

Stub example (parses, renders empty - do not push):

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "slot"
    }
  ]
}
```

## pageview

Pageview - Multi-page document root - each child is one page (the modal `body` shape).

Wire kind: 33. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| children | `c` | array | Pages. In a modal the device frames them with a STEP n OF m eyebrow + paging dots - do not add your own. |

- Outside the modal renderer a pageview degrades to page 1 + static dots.

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "pageview",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "box",
      "c": [
        {
          "k": "text",
          "t": "Pick an environment"
        },
        {
          "k": "choice",
          "id": "env",
          "c": [
            {
              "k": "text",
              "id": "staging",
              "t": "Staging"
            },
            {
              "k": "text",
              "id": "prod",
              "t": "Production"
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "k": "box",
      "c": [
        {
          "k": "btn",
          "id": "go",
          "t": "Deploy",
          "role": "submit",
          "key": "up"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## choice

Choice - Tappable option list (THE streamable picker): one inset card, a cell per option.

Wire kind: 34. Streamable: yes.

| field | JSON key | type | notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| children | `c` | array | Options: text/row/btn nodes. Each option needs an `id` (rides the reply) and a label; options without a resolvable label are skipped. |
| advance | `advance` | bool | v12 wizard auto-advance: a pick acks and pages forward; terminal on the last page (the picked option id becomes the action). JSON `advance: true`; wire key `adv`. |

- With a node `id` the picked option collects into the terminal values{} map.

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "box",
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "text",
      "t": "Pick a region"
    },
    {
      "k": "choice",
      "id": "region",
      "advance": true,
      "c": [
        {
          "k": "text",
          "id": "eu",
          "t": "Europe"
        },
        {
          "k": "text",
          "id": "us",
          "t": "US"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## image

Image - A foreground image. The asset reference rides the node id; push the pixels over the asset plane first, then reference them.

Wire kind: 35. Streamable: yes.

- The asset ref is the node `id`, resolved against the on-device asset store (#547). No image-specific CBOR keys decode today; push the encoded image over the XFER asset plane before a surface references it. A missing asset renders a placeholder, never a blank or crash.

Example:

```json
{
  "k": "screen",
  "lyt": 1,
  "c": [
    {
      "k": "image",
      "id": "apple-music.art"
    }
  ]
}
```
